headline: Superior HealthPlan Designates Three Texas Providers as Mental Health Rehabilitation and Targeted Case Management Centers of Excellence
summary: Superior HealthPlan has designated three Texas providers as Mental Health Rehabilitation (MHR) and Targeted Case Management (TCM) Centers of Excellence. The new program recognizes multi-specialty groups, also known as Non‑Local Mental Health Authority (Non‑LMHA) providers, that consistently meet elevated standards for clinical quality, compliance, and coordinated care delivery. The designation allows the providers to offer more streamlined care for children and youth in Texas who have complex be
